target:configuration-properties.target:property:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<ns1:namedConfiguration ns1:CLASS_NAME="com.fiorano.adapter.jca.flattoxml.FlatXMLConfiguration" xmlns:ns1="uri:com.fiorano.adapter.jca.flattoxml">
    <ns1:schemaContent><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
 
<!DOCTYPE FileLayout
  PUBLIC "-//Fiorano Software Technologies Pvt. Ltd.//DTD FileSchema 1.0//EN" "fileschema_1_0.dtd">
<FileLayout>
   <FileSections name="MTRecords">
      <GlobalParsingInfo ignore-lines-start-lineno="0" ignore-lines-end-lineno="0">
         <RecordDelimiter>
            <Delimiter type="custom-delimiter" escapeCharType="Character">03</Delimiter>
         </RecordDelimiter>
         <DefaultFieldDelimiter>
            <Delimiter type="custom-delimiter" escapeCharType="Character" escapeChar="5c">5f4e4f4e455f</Delimiter>
         </DefaultFieldDelimiter>
      </GlobalParsingInfo>
      <Record xmlType="Element" minOccurs="-1" maxOccurs="-1" parsingType="DELIMITED" childCount="0" name="MTRecord">
         <RecordIdentifier type="None"/>
         <FieldDelimiter>
            <Delimiter type="custom-delimiter" escapeCharType="Character" escapeChar="5c">5f4e4f4e455f</Delimiter>
         </FieldDelimiter>
         <RecordContent>
            <Field xmlType="Element" startPosition="1" endPosition="1" trimspaces="Leading" alignment="LEFT" mapIfNull="NO" name="MT">
               <DataType format="">String</DataType>
            </Field>
         </RecordContent>
      </Record>
   </FileSections>
</FileLayout></ns1:schemaContent>
</ns1:namedConfiguration>
